heading: Reserve component training at water resources development projects
label: 585 Reserve component training at water resources development projects

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In carrying out military training activities or otherwise fulfilling military training requirements, units or members of a reserve component of the Armed Forces may perform services and furnish supplies in support of a water resources development project or program of the Corps of Engineers without reimbursement.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: This section shall not apply to any member of a reserve component of the Armed Forces who is employed by the Corps of Engineers on a full-time basis.
